When Games Become Too Serious
← BACK
Essay Series ESSAY 2026.04.02

When Games Become Too Serious

An essay on the fatigue produced when games demand too much gravity from both narrative and play.

Not every work needs to carry a monumental message.

The text asks how lightness and triviality can become aesthetic strengths.
